overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking slowly through a vast moonlit field of purple flowers in Shirotsu Swamp. The scene features atmospheric mist drifting across distant mountains under a bright full moon, creating a serene and contemplative nighttime atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: moonlit swamp flower field with distant misty mountains

agents.ego_description: samurai character in traditional orange robes walking slowly through the purple flower field toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: bright full moon high in the night sky casting pale light over the landscape
dark silhouetted mountains forming the horizon with mist gathered at their base
low-lying atmospheric fog drifting slowly across the field surface
dense carpet of blooming purple flowers covering the ground in all directions
scattered dark trees visible on the left horizon against the mountain backdrop

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks steadily through the vast field of purple flowers under the bright full moon. The camera follows smoothly from behind as mist drifts across the distant mountain range, maintaining a serene and atmospheric nighttime setting throughout the continuous shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit landscape that maintains a serene and contemplative atmosphere. It begins by trailing a samurai as he walks steadily through a vast field of purple flowers, with the camera gliding smoothly behind him. As he progresses, the view expands to reveal layers of atmospheric mist drifting across a distant mountain range. The scene remains immersed in the cool glow of a bright full moon, which casts a consistent light over the floral terrain and the hazy peaks beyond.
